_comment: Single-Box Directive 3 §B — S3-side retention as a BUCKET LIFECYCLE rule (not a script delete), so the box's S3 credential stays PutObject-only (s3-backup-iam-policy.json). Expires box Postgres dumps after 30 days. Apply with: aws s3api put-bucket-lifecycle-configuration --bucket astre-aramo-backups --lifecycle-configuration file://deploy/backup/s3-backup-lifecycle.json
